## Safe on all surfaces & Matte finish
That's right, all surfaces! Q²M Interior Detailer is the ideal interior maintenance product to remove light grime, contaminants, and leave a fresh and purified interior feel. It’s safe on leather, plastic, Alcantara, textiles, glass, LCD touch panels, instrument panels, and all types of interior trim. It will leave a matte and non-sticky finish.

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-interior-detailer_cd535c47-4c52-44ce-880d-a8c6f0440a98.jpg?v=1701980404&width=1080)

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-interior-detailer-tips.jpg?v=1701980404&width=1080)

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-interior-detailer-kills-germs.jpg?v=1701980702&width=2400)

Hygienic. kills 99% of bacteria & germs.
These days, keeping your surroundings clean has a completely new meaning and may decide the health of you and your loved ones. Q²M Interior Detailer has an alcohol-based formula that removes the majority of organic contaminants from any surface. This is especially useful in high-traffic areas such as the steering wheel, shifter, and instrument panels. Kid and pet-friendly

[

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-leather-cleaner-strong.jpg?v=1701981214&width=1080)

](https://carzilla.ca/products/gyeon-qm-leather-cleaner-strong-500ml)

## Strong cleaner
Use GYEON Leather Cleaner Strong for stubborn stains and dirt. Use the leather brush to clean perforations.

The Leather Set has everything you need to keep your leather fresh and protected.

[
Shop GYEON Leather Care Kit

## Leather Coat
Now that you've got it all clean, it's time to preserve the finish.

[
Shop GYEON Leather Coat
](https://carzilla.ca/products/gyeon-leather-coat-400ml)

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-interior-detailer-with-towel.jpg?v=1701981697&width=2400)

Quick Interior Detailer
The GYEON Interior Detailer is one of our house favorites; it not only wipes off streak-free (can be used on glass) but also leaves an OEM matte mature finish with no germs left behind. Tested by KTR (Korea Testing & Research Institute) to eliminate 99% of bacteria.

**Tip:** Since the Interior Detailer does not leave a finish behind, if you're looking for more of a sheen, you can top your dash with GYEON Preserve.
**Scroll down for detailer reviews and FAQs.**

Description

# GYEON Q²M Interior Detailer 500ml

## STRONG HYGIENIC ACTION WHILE REMOVING DAILY CONTAMINANTS FOR A PURE AND CLEAN SURFACE.

[![image](https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0013/8903/5555/files/download-gyeon-brochure_480x480.jpg?v=1666391207)](https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0013/8903/5555/files/GYEON__06_Leaflet_InteriorSurfaceProtection_2021_WEB.pdf?v=1666391020)

These days keeping your surroundings clean has a completely new meaning and may decide about the health of you and your loved ones. Q²M InteriorDetailer has an alcohol-based formula (60%), which removes the majority of organic contaminants from any surface. Q²M InteriorDetailer does not replace Q²M VinylCleaner or Q²M Leather Cleaner, but compliments them.

### QUICK DETAILER FOR YOUR INTERIOR

Q²M InteriorDetailer is the ideal interior maintenance product, to remove light grime, contaminants and leave a fresh and purify interior feel. It’s safe on leather, plastic, Alcantara, textiles, glass and all types of interior trim. It will leave a matte and not sticky finish.

What's the different between Interior and Leather Cleaner?

GYEON Interior Detailer is for light touch-ups, able to tackle makeup, sunscreen, and coffee spills. However, for a thorough cleaning, you'll need a stronger chemical, such as GYEON Leather Cleaner Strong or Mild.

Difference between Interior Detailer and Vinyl Cleaner?

GYEON's Vinyl Cleaner, with a pH of 9, is highly effective against etched stains and glue residues. We recommend using GYEON Vinyl Cleaner for a deep clean, followed by Interior Detailer for maintenance. There's no need to consistently use a strong chemical for weekly cleaning.

Does it leave any protection behind?

No, it does not. It's recommended to protect your leather with GYEON Leather Coat or Leather Shield and use GYEON Preserve for dashboards.

Anything I should be aware of?

This is great for cleaning around the house as well, as it leaves no chemical residues behind. By the way, if you have stainless appliances, you'll know how difficult it is to clean them without any streaks. GYEON Interior Detailer is the only product that we've found to work flawlessly when it comes to cleaning stainless appliances.
